name: Monotype
desc: Pick a type — catch nodes only ever offer Pokémon of that type. Clear the stage with each type.

name: Wish Upon a Star
desc: Start with Star Piece active — your team is replaced with random Pokémon after every boss.

name: Trick Room
desc: Speed is reversed — the slower Pokémon attacks first in every clash.

name: Nuzlocke
desc: Permadeath — any Pokémon that faints is lost for the rest of the run.

name: Inverse World
desc: The type chart is inverted — weaknesses become resistances and vice-versa.

name: Legendary Opposition
desc: Every enemy trainer fields a team of legendary Pokémon matching the map's type.

name: Arena Floors
desc: On each map you can only catch Pokémon (catches & shinies) of that map's boss type.

name: Ride or Die
desc: Catch up to six — but you can never release or replace a Pokémon.

name: Little League
desc: Your Pokémon can never evolve. Win the stage with their first forms.

name: Walk It Off
desc: No Pokémon Centers, and no free heals between battles. Manage your HP.

name: Wanted
desc: After the first layer, every node but the boss is a trainer battle — and every enemy trainer fights at +50% level.

name: Ultimate Challenge
desc: Nuzlocke, no heals and no evolutions — all at once. The true test of mastery.
